name: Vulkan Game Engine
description: Personal Vulkan game engine with layered architecture, PBR pipeline, and platform abstraction.

bullets.text: Accelerated Vulkan game engine development with AI-assisted tooling including Cursor, by using targeted generation and review while retaining manual architectural control.
Evolved a custom Vulkan renderer into a layered game engine, by abstracting graphics and platform concerns away from high-level game code.
Built a complete PBR pipeline with modern lighting and scalable materials, by integrating material systems into the Vulkan render architecture.
Reduced coupling between engine subsystems and clarified ownership, by implementing a centralized resource manager encapsulating asset lifetimes and raw data handles.
Implemented gamepad and keyboard input supporting fully decoupled game logic, by a listener pattern separating hardware polling from gameplay systems.
Implemented point, directional, and spot lights in the Vulkan pipeline, by depth buffers, camera and light uniform buffers, and a light entity system.
Authored GLSL PBR shaders with TBN normal mapping and metallic-roughness-AO sampling, by Vulkan descriptor sets and material uniform buffers with gamma-correct albedo.
